title: Caramelized Japanese Chicken Drumsticks Skewers
description: Rich and aerated Japanese dish featuring caramelized chicken drumsticks, perfect for midnight cravings, this recipe is also ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the chicken drumsticks onto skewers, if using wooden skewers, soak them in water for 30 minutes before using.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sake, mirin, brown sugar, garlic, ginger, and black pepper.
Add the chicken drumsticks to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with sesame oil, then arrange the chicken drumsticks on the baking sheet.
Bake the chicken for 25 minutes, then increase the oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until caramelized.
Brush the chicken with sesame oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds during the last minute of cooking.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
